title.en: The Window on a Cold Morning

intent:
On a cold morning, mother enters the narrator's dark room and opens the window. The narrator discovers a towel and paper already placed below the window and picks up the towel — change of state from lying awake waiting to rising and taking the towel. This is a DISCOVERY story, not a gift-transfer: narrator acts on their own in the closer. Mint budget: 4 (部屋, 入る, 開ける, 誰). N5_dare_who introduced via 「誰ですか」(narrator asks who entered). N5_ya_partial introduced via タオルや紙がありました. N5_made_until reinforced via 朝まで. Debt words hit: 窓 (W00007 ★), 冷たい (W00057 ★), タオル (W00060 ★), 下 (W00049 ★), 待つ (W00044 ★), 紙 (W00040 ★). Closer shape: narrator self-action (取る) — narrator picks up towel. NOT gift-transfer, NOT departure-walk, NOT noun-pile, NOT noun-WA-noun-DESU.

PREMISE CONTRACT (story 15)
  one_sentence_event:    母が部屋に入り窓を開けたとき、ナレーターは窓の下のタオルを取る。
  change_of_state:       at s0: cold morning, narrator lying awake in dark; at closer: narrator picks up the towel — ready to begin the day.
  scene_novelty_claim:   I am NOT writing a classroom/park/school_after_class story. Scene is home_morning.
  anchor_novelty_claim:  Anchor is 窓 (window). Last appeared in story 1.
  closer_shape_claim:    Closer shape: narrator self-action (取る). NOT a gift-transfer (unlike stories 12-14), NOT noun-pile, NOT noun-WA-noun-DESU, NOT departure-walk.
  why_not_filler:        母 — her arrival triggers the narrator's question and the window opening; without her the anchor does nothing. 窓 — state change closed→open; the scene's physical pivot. タオルや紙 — already-placed objects that explain why narrator rises; towel = the object narrator takes in closer. 朝まで — narrator has been awake waiting; this explains why mother comes to wake them.
  obligations_absorbed:  must-reinforce N5_made_until via 朝まで待っていました (s5, narrator was lying awake); must-introduce N5_dare_who + N5_ya_partial both organically (s2 誰 from darkness/surprise; s1 や from listing of placed items).

FORBIDDEN THIS STORY:
  scene_class    (last 3 stories): classroom, park, school_after_class
  anchor_object  (last 5 stories): 傘, 卵, 手紙, 鉛筆, 雲
  closer_shape   (last 3 stories): noun-NO-noun-WA-noun-noun-WO-noun-noun-P:まで-noun, noun-WA-noun-DESU, noun-WA-noun-NO-noun-WO-noun-noun
  opening_seqs   (last 3 stories): 私/鉛筆/短かった, 学校/本/読みました, 公園/静か

sentences.jp: 窓の下にタオルや紙がありました。
sentences.en: Below the window, there was a towel and some paper.

sentences.jp: 朝まで待っていました。
sentences.en: I had been waiting until morning.

sentences.jp: 母が部屋に入ってきました。
sentences.en: My mother came into the room.

sentences.jp: 母は「このタオルを使ってください」と言いました。
母はタオルを渡しました。
